name: David Chesky
abstract: David Chesky is an American pianist, composer, producer, arranger, and co-founder of the independent, audiophile label Chesky Records. He is also co-founder and CEO of HDtracks, an online music store that sells high-resolution digital music.

about_quotes.speaker: John Pizzarelli, Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: Chesky, David and Norman Chesky... David Chesky says, 'well we’re going to get Milt Hinton and Clark Terry and your dad and we’ll make a record with you singing.'
about_quotes.doc_title: John Pizzarelli, Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 29, 2000 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Cobb
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] We did two with – I co-produced them with David Chesky.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Cobb — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
